_comment: Sonar-compatible tsconfig for SonarQube 9.9 static analysis only.
_comment2: SonarQube 9.9's bundled TS bridge does not support moduleResolution:bundler,
_comment3: allowImportingTsExtensions, or ignoreDeprecations. This file uses nodenext.
_comment4: Do not use for compilation ? use the app-specific tsconfigs instead.
